config.neo4j.topic.cypher.ctsserver.CTS_DataCen: call apoc.do.case([ event.op = 'c','MERGE (c:CTSCustomer {CTSCustID: event.after.FromCTSCustID}) MERGE (c2:CTSCustomer {CTSCustID: event.after.ToCTSCustID}) MERGE (c)-[r:HAS_EXCEPTION]->(c2) ON CREATE SET r.Remark = event.after.Remark,r.CreatedDate = event.after.CreatedDate,r.CreatedBy = event.after.CreatedBy RETURN r',event.op = 'u','MATCH (:CTSCustomer {CTSCustID: event.before.FromCTSCustID})-[oldR:HAS_EXCEPTION]->(:CTSCustomer {CTSCustID: event.before.ToCTSCustID}) DELETE oldR WITH event MERGE (c:CTSCustomer {CTSCustID: event.after.FromCTSCustID}) MERGE (c2:CTSCustomer {CTSCustID: event.after.ToCTSCustID}) MERGE (c)-[r:HAS_EXCEPTION]->(c2) ON CREATE SET r.Remark = event.after.Remark,r.CreatedDate = event.after.CreatedDate,r.CreatedBy = event.after.CreatedBy RETURN r' ,event.op = 'd','MATCH (:CTSCustomer {CTSCustID: event.before.FromCTSCustID})-[oldR:HAS_EXCEPTION]->(:CTSCustomer {CTSCustID: event.before.ToCTSCustID}) DELETE oldR' ] ,'',{event:event}) yield value return value
